brief.company_overview: PwC's global revenues were US$55.4 billion in FY 2024. PwC's Assurance practice generated $19.5 billion in FY 2024. PwC's Tax and Consulting practice generated $12.6 billion in FY 2024. PwC Egypt Technology and Innovation Centre is a technology hub. The PwC Egypt Technology and Innovation Centre brings together the best of consulting with innovative technologies. Egypt's Technology and Innovation Centre (ETIC) of PwC was opened by the Egyptian Minister of Communications and Information Technology Amr Talaat. PwC's ETIC has $10 million investments. Egypt's Technology and Innovation Center (ETIC) is a technology delivery hub. The ETIC brings together the best of consultancy with innovative technologies to build trust, solve important problems and deliver sustained solutions. The ETIC adds up to PwC's global strategy 'The New Equation'. PwC has been established in the Middle East for 40 years. PwC has more than 12,000 people in 12 countries across the Middle East.
